japaneseSummary: Pattern and ten-god evaluation are indexed to Yuanhai Ziping tradition; exact quotation is not stored in Phase 3.
modernInterpretation: Use month-related ten-god evidence as a pattern candidate, then separate establishment, breakage, and rescue.

japaneseSummary: Climate balancing is indexed to Qiongtong Baojian tradition; exact quotation is not stored in Phase 3.
modernInterpretation: Keep climate yongshen separate from support-control yongshen and show method conflict when present.

japaneseSummary: Qi-flow and special pattern review are indexed to Ditian Sui tradition.
modernInterpretation: Treat follow/transformation cases as candidates until strict conditions are confirmed.
